detail.description: Chad Stevens out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Jorge Barrosa. Jake McCarthy scores.
Chad Stevens flies out to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt.

Chad Stevens singles on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Sterlin Thompson scores.

Chad Stevens grounds out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
Chad Stevens grounds out, second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Braxton Fulford to 3rd.
Chad Stevens grounds out, third baseman Luis Rengifo to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.

Chad Stevens grounds out softly, pitcher Erik Miller to first baseman Rafael Devers.
